description: The five-year Living Literature & Language rotation continues. Each unit available in homeschool and co-op versions.

units.title: Summer of Foundations
units.subtitle: Of Mice and Men — Steinbeck
units.description: A 6-week immersive summer unit for high school. Charlotte Mason narration meets Steinbeck's moral landscape.

units.title: The Art of Attention
units.subtitle: Poetry + The Old Man and the Sea
units.description: 6 weeks of close reading with poetry, followed by 6 weeks with Hemingway. Two lenses, one deep habit of attention.

units.title: A Midsummer Night's Dream
units.subtitle: William Shakespeare
units.description: Shakespeare's comedy through the lens of imagination, love, and ordered reality — a full semester unit.
